title: Red Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Red Express is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Red Express invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Surat location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Red Express:
Red Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Red Express!
